description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a rectangular walled yard with a manicured lawn and geometric landscaping. The house features a simple gable roof with a chimney and a mix of wood and white exterior finishes. Large windows are present on the side and rear, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house includes a covered entryway and a paved driveway leading up to the main door. The backyard area contains a sunken seating or lounge area, bordered by low walls and integrated benches. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a gable roof, large windows, and a walled yard featuring geometric landscaping and a sunken lounge area.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entryway, driveway, and the sunken lounge area in the yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the long, uninterrupted gable roof and the back wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Left-side view displaying the side elevation, the geometric lawn layout, and the sunken lounge area.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the main entrance, large windows, and the open yard space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a simple door, paved approach, and minimal decorative elements
